ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
commentDB = {
    ["검색키워드1"] = {
        ["Title"] = [=[단서(1)의 제목]=],
        ["Content"] = [=[단서(1)의 내용을
쓴다.]=],
    },
    ["검색키워드2"] = {
        ["Title"] = [=[단서(2)의 제목]=],
        ["Content"] = [=[단서(2)의 내용을
쓴다.]=],
    },
    -- 키워드 부분에는 공백을 쓰면 안된다.
}

replaceTable = {
    ["검섹키워드1"] = '검색키워드1',
    ["검색키와드1"] = '검색키워드1',
    -- 이렇게 쓰면 검섹키워드1을 써도 검색키워드1로 검색된다.
}


colorHex = {
    White = "FFFFFF", Brown = "713B17", Red = "DA1917",
    Orange = "F5740B", Yellow = "E7E52D", Green = "31B319",
    Teal = "21B19B", Blue = "1F87FF", Purple = "A021B1",
    Pink = "EE5BB1", Black = "000000", Grey = "8C8C8C"
}

function onLoad()
    
end


function run(player, value, id)
	local str = value
    if value == '' then
        return
    end
    local pcNameOfColor = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcNameOfColor')

    if pcNameOfColor == nil or (pcNameOfColor[player.color] == nil and player.color ~= 'Black') then
        return
    end

    if pcNameOfColor[player.color] ~= '7' and player.color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', '')

	local result = {}
	for i = 1, #str do
		if string.byte(str, i) ~= 32 then
			result[#result + 1] = string.sub(str, i, i)
		end
	end
	local nospace = table.concat(result)
    if replaceTable[nospace] ~= nil then
        nospace = replaceTable[nospace]
    end
    makeCard(player.color, nospace)
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end


function makeCard(pColor, keyword)
    local sample = findObject('GMCard', nil, 'CardForCopy')
    local newCard = nil 
    local thispos = self.getPosition()
    thispos.y = thispos.y + 1
    local vcolor
    local hcolor
    local content = nil
    local title = nil
    vcolor = pColor .. '|Black'
    

    if commentDB[keyword] ~= nil or (content ~= nil) then
        content = commentDB[keyword]['Content']
        if content == nil then
            return
        end
        if title == nil then
            title = commentDB[keyword]['Title']
        end

        newCard = sample.clone({position=thispos})
		newCard.setName('조사카드')
        local wholeScript = [===[
function onLoad()
	local ui_script = [=[<Panel id="main">
<Panel id="ownerPanel" visibility="]===] .. vcolor .. [===[" scale="0.2 0.185 0.2" position="0 0 -51" rotation="0 0 180" width="1000" height="1622">
<Text font="font/kpwbatang" id="title" fontSize="56" alignment="UpperCenter" color="Black" fontStyle="Bold">]===] .. title .. [===[</Text>	
<Text font="font/kpwbatang" id="content" fontSize="37" alignment="UpperLeft" color="Black" offsetXY="0 -120">]===] .. content .. [===[</Text>
</Panel>

</Panel>
]=]
	self.UI.setXml(ui_script)
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getTitle()
	return [=[]===] .. title .. [===[]=]
end
]===]
        newCard.setLuaScript(wholeScript)

        if Player['Black'].seated == true then
            printToColor('조사성공: ' .. keyword, 'Black', {0.2, 1, 0.2})
        end
    else
        if Player['Black'].seated == true then
            printToColor('조사실패: ' .. keyword, 'Black', {1, 0.2, 0.2})
        end
    end

    if newCard ~= nil then
        newCard.setName('')
        newCard.setDescription('')
        newCard.setGMNotes('')
        Wait.time(function()
            newCard.flip()
        end, 1)
    end
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end
